name: Tiger Shark (Enemy Territory)
description:
“Theres always a bigger fish.”

(Bot request by @StormLendinez)

Scenario: You were scavenging the broken facility of Thunder Science Co on your last legs, having terrible luck trying to find any rations to keep yourself going.

After a bit of self assurance, you ventured beyond your shelter, making way from the labs to the pool rooms in search of literally anything.

Eventually, you found an extremely convenient stash after wading through the flooded waters— only to be interrupted mid thieving as a very disgruntled creature confronts you

…

[Side Note: More vore oriented than absorption/“transfurmation]

If anyone even notices the update, i just added a tag.

Took me awhile to finally cook another bot, hope it isn’t much of a bother.

Made a fleshed out scenario and base template for this character, incase i ever came around to making more of these kinds of bots.

Very appreciative of those who left these suggestions on my older post, might take a bit of a break now that i concluded the 3 milestone bots. Of course i will be checking periodically for anything you guys have to say so any comments are welcome.

Like and follow for more Dooby classics
